scope: Pre-Feb-2025 historical backfill — one-time bulk harvest from swimrankings.net per-event history pages
supersededFile: Previous meta (parse_swimrankings.py live-window probe, Oct 2025) overwritten on user approval 2026-05-15. parse_swimrankings.py is now superseded by this harvest + the upcoming swimming.ca Lenex ingest pipeline.

pass0a.purpose: Crawl post-2020 Brossard-attended meet pages to discover roster
pass0a.result: 170 unique Brossard meets discovered (45 post-2020), 61 new athleteIds beyond seed-17

pass0b.purpose: Cross-reference statsman record-setter names against swimrankings athleteFind
pass0b.result: 11 high-confidence matches; 10 new athleteIds net of Pass 0a overlap. 35 candidates had no swimrankings profile (esp. pre-2005 historical record-setters). Note: Gail Desjardins (statsman #1 all-time) had no athleteFind hit but Pass 0a captured her via her recent meet attendance as aid 4204245.

pass1.purpose: Fetch each athlete's BEST page to parse bio + event list
pass1.result: 67/88 BEST pages parsed. 21 NO_ACCESS — restricted profile pages (includes all 10 Pass 0b additions: Lippinghof, Mongeon, Vroom, Massicotte, Svartman, Rouleau, Stringer, Belham, Pelland, Grondin; plus 11 Pass 0a one-shot meet appearances)

pass2.purpose: Fetch per-event history page for each (athleteId, unique styleId) tuple
pass2.failureMode: Swimrankings daily page-view quota kicked in mid-harvest. The first ~15 athletes in roster order completed fully; subsequent athletes returned NO_ACCESS for most styleIds

outputFiles.brossard_swimrankings_athletes.json: 67 athletes with bio + event style list. Schema: aid/last/first/yob/club/styleIds[]
outputFiles._pass0a_snapshot.json: Intermediate state — seed-17 MEET pages + post-2020 meet IDs + 61 newly-discovered athleteIds
outputFiles._pass0b_snapshot.json: Intermediate state — top-50 statsman record-setters cross-referenced via athleteFind

topAthletesBySwimCount.name: BERGER Christian (aid 4204240)
topAthletesBySwimCount.note: All-time men's records leader, 307 statsman records

topAthletesBySwimCount.name: DESJARDINS Gail (aid 4204245)
topAthletesBySwimCount.note: ALL-TIME women's records leader, 325+ statsman records. Discovered via Pass 0a (intra-club meet roster), not Pass 0b name search

topAthletesBySwimCount.name: AVILES Carlos (aid 4209372)
topAthletesBySwimCount.note: Project owner; statsman record-setter with 68 records

resumeInstructions.blockedBy: Swimrankings daily page-view quota. Resets ~24 hours after first restricted fetch (~2026-05-15T03:30 UTC, so resume window opens ~2026-05-16T04:00 UTC)
stepsOnResume: 1. Re-inject scraper module (lost on page navigation between sessions)
2. Load brossard_swimrankings_athletes.json to get the 67 known athletes + their styleId lists
3. For athletes in athletesAwaitingPass2 (38 athletes), fire per-event fetches with CONSERVATIVE throttling (pauseEvery=15, pauseMs=30s) to spread load across quota window
4. Optionally retry the 21 noAccessAids — they may have specific profile restrictions, not quota-based
5. Merge new swims into brossard_swimrankings_swims.json (dedupe key: athleteId|date|distance|stroke|course|time)

knownIssues: FINA points column in some BEST table parses comes out with wrong value (column-shift bug in parseAthleteBestPage) — affects only the PB metadata cached in athletes.json, not the per-swim data in swims.json which is parsed independently and verified
Pass 2 missed 31 athletes entirely due to daily quota — most notable misses include CHOLETTE Vincent (active), CREVIER Jean-Francois (active), MASUTTI Leanna (active junior), SAMSON Philippe (active)
